title: ** Avaliação Honesta sobre Este Suplemento**
review: Este suplemento pode parecer impressionante à primeira vista, destacando uma concentração elevada de **15% de withanolides** e a combinação de KSM-66 e Sensoril. No entanto, fiquei extremamente dececionado ao analisar com detalhe e perceber o quanto este produto induz em erro. Aqui estão os factos:1. **Doses Reais de KSM-66:**- Este produto contém apenas **150 mg de KSM-66**, o que é **muito inferior às doses de 300-600 mg** usadas nos estudos clínicos que demonstraram benefícios claros para testosterona, energia e performance física.- Cada cápsula fornece apenas **7,5 mg de withanolides do KSM-66**, um valor bem abaixo do necessário para alinhar com os estudos.2. **Withanolides do Sensoril:**- Para atingir os "15% de withanolides", o suplemento mistura withanolides do **Sensoril** (10%) com os do KSM-66 (5%). O Sensoril, embora bom para stress e sono, **não é eficaz para testosterona** ou performance física, criando uma falsa impressão de potência.3. **Falta de Transparência no Marketing:**- O marketing do produto é altamente enganador: foca-se no "15% de withanolides" sem explicar que a maior parte vem do Sensoril, e não do KSM-66.- Além disso, a parte de trás da embalagem, que mostra a composição real e as doses de cada extrato, **não aparece nas fotos promocionais**, dificultando que os consumidores tomem uma decisão informada.4. **Preço Desproporcional:**- Este suplemento é **mais caro que outros produtos que oferecem doses superiores de KSM-66 puro (300-600 mg)**, o que não se justifica, dado o baixo conteúdo de KSM-66 e o foco em Sensoril para "complementar".**Conclusão:**Se o objetivo for **aumentar a testosterona, energia e resistência**, recomendo escolher suplementos que contenham **pelo menos 600 mg de KSM-66 puro por dose diária**, padronizados a 5% de withanolides, como indicado nos estudos clínicos. Este produto, além de ser **fraco em KSM-66**, é desnecessariamente caro e enganador para quem realmente procura eficácia.Estou muito dececionado com a falta de transparência e o marketing enganador, que claramente prioriza vendas em vez de resultados reais. Espero que este comentário ajude outros a evitar cair nesta armadilha e a fazer escolhas mais informadas.

title: Efectos secundarios graves
review: Llevo un tiempo tomando Ashwagandha, en dosis más pequeñas, y nunca me había encontrado algo con estos efectos.Decidí probar porque tiene una cantidad alta de Ashwagandha, y además vitaminas. Lo he probado tanto a la noche, como el mismo frasco recomienda, como a la mañana. Ninguna de las pruebas ha funcionado.La cosa es que las veces que lo he tomado los efectos secundarios, o principales porque es lo único que he tenido, han sido horribles. El primer día la tomé por la mañana y en el trabajo casi me caigo al suelo porque sentí un dolor muy fuerte en el costado que me dejó al rato sin respiración.Luego la tomé dos noches, en la primera sentí dolor leve, sin más y en la segunda otra vez dolor fuerte y mal estar que me duró al siguiente día.He buscado información del laboratorio y no hay nada, es difícil ver procedencia y demás. Por lo que tras los efectos y la poca información, tengo 0 confianza en este producto. Luego tienen un teléfono de atención al cliente bastante raro, con mensajes muy tipo "spam". Muy raro todo.No lo recomiendo para nada.

title: ¿Dónde está el doctor 👨‍⚕️?
review: Las pastillas las conozco porque las he tomado de otra marca. Lo que no es cierto es que indican que tienes acceso a un médico para chatear. Lo he intentado y no responde nadie.Con lo cual le bajo la puntuación por no ser cierto y anunciar una cosa que no es.

title: No me convence
review: La Ashwagandha es un extracto que me tomo normalmente ya que me cuesta mucho conciliar el sueño. Normalmente sé cuando uno funciona y cuando no, y en este caso, llevo días utilizando estas cápsulas y no me han surtido ningún efecto.Deben de tener poco porcentaje de esto, ya que no he notado nada por la noche tras utilizarlo.Buscaría otras opciones.

title: Positive update…Game changer!!
date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 26 February 2025
review: I bought these for two reasons1. Improvement in sleep. I wake often and sometimes find it hard to get back to sleep2. Restless and irritated legs when going to bedSo I’ve given these over 3 weeks now and initially felt no benefit whatsoeverBut… I’m a believer in giving things time to work so here’s my takeCon… no improvement in my sleep patternPro… this product has totally cured my restless legs which makes it easier to relax prior to sleepingFor me, this makes it a worthwhile buy and I will be reorderingUPDATE…I am a believer in giving supplements time to really take effect so I reordered. I’m now well into second bottle and am now seeing more positive effects.I initially had results from restless legs which for me was great but no help in my sleep pattern.However in the last couple of weeks, although I still wake often, I now go back to sleep much quicker and sometimes I can get as much as 3 1/2 hours continuous sleep. On the whole, I’m now getting between 6-7 hours sleep a night (albeit broken) with NO long periods of wakefulness in between.Conclusion..This product has been a game changer for me and I would urge anyone to try it out for at least 6-8 weeks before deciding if it works for you.

title: Potent Adaptogen and Nootropic
date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 6 September 2024
review: Pros:High Potency: Contains KSM-66 and Sensoril extracts, both known for their high concentration of withanolides (15-20%), which are believed to enhance the effectiveness of ashwagandha.Comprehensive Benefits: Promotes various benefits including improved sleep, wellness, energy, concentration, and cortisol reduction, addressing multiple aspects of health.Adaptogen and Nootropic: Acts as an adaptogen to help the body cope with stress and as a nootropic to potentially enhance cognitive function.Natural Ingredient: Ashwagandha is a well-regarded herb in traditional medicine with a long history of use for stress management and overall wellness.2-Month Supply: Offers a sufficient supply for a two-month period, which can be more economical and convenient.Cons:Effectiveness Varies: Individual responses to ashwagandha can vary, and the supplement might not provide the same benefits for everyone.Potential Side Effects: Some people may experience side effects like digestive issues, headaches, or drowsiness, especially at higher doses.Interactions: May interact with certain medications or conditions, so it's important to consult with a healthcare provider before starting, especially if you have health concerns or are on other medications.Quality Control: As with any supplement, the quality and effectiveness can vary between brands and batches, so it's essential to choose a reputable manufacturer.Limited Evidence: While ashwagandha has traditional support, scientific evidence on some of its claimed benefits is still evolving.

title: Ashwagandha KSM 66 + calming nutrients
date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 4 August 2024
review: We've been testing out this supplement for two weeks and can say that we find it does work for us. It definitely contributes to a sense of calmness and 'I can cope with this'. I prefer to take it at night to aid in relaxation and sleep, while my husband takes it during the day to help with stress management. He buys ashwagandha supplements on a regular basis and he knows what to look for. He gives this one the thumbs-up.There is one aspect that we didn't like which is the actual label quality. It arrived looking scuffed and scratched and while one shouldn't judge a book by its cover, the condition was a little off-putting. However, this was just the outer label and the quality of supplement itself is fine.

title: 1 a day
date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 4 August 2024
review: KSM-66 is a very different production method to provide ashwagandha as a supplement,KSM-66 is produced using a unique extraction process called "green chemistry" that doesn't use alcohol or synthetic solvents. This process is designed to retain the full spectrum of bioactive compounds present in the raw ashwagandha root.KSM-66 is known for its high concentration of withanolides, the active compounds in ashwagandha. It typically contains about 5% withanolides, making it one of the most potent forms of ashwagandha on the market.Unlike some other extracts that use both the root and the leaves of the ashwagandha plant, KSM-66 is made exclusively from the root. This is in line with traditional Ayurvedic practices and is believed to result in a more balanced and effective extract.For all those reasons, that is why i prefer this type of supplement now, to build on that, these capsules also have vitamins, zinc, magnesium added, so a very rounded formulation from what i can see.I am afollowing the guidance of 1 capsule a day , which i have been taking in the morning with food and water.This really is the best formula to look at for Ashwagandha in my opinion.I have tried other variants in the past but i really feel as though this delivers everything i am looking for and will continue to consider this brand and product in a few months time when it has all been consumed.

title: Natural Stress Relief
date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 1 August 2024
review: I've been taking this Ashwagandha KSM-66 + Sensoril supplement for a while now, and it's been a great addition to my wellness routine. Known for its adaptogenic properties, this supplement helps manage stress and promote a sense of calm. The combination of KSM-66 and Sensoril provides a potent dose of withanolides (15-20%), which are the active compounds believed to offer these benefits.The capsules are easy to swallow, and I've noticed a subtle yet consistent improvement in my mood and energy levels. It's especially useful during busy or stressful periods, helping me stay grounded and focused. As a nootropic, it's also been beneficial for mental clarity, which is a plus for staying sharp throughout the day.Pros:Stress Relief: Effective at reducing stress and promoting a sense of calm.Potent Formula: Contains a high concentration of withanolides (15-20%) from KSM-66 and Sensoril.Improved Mental Clarity: Acts as a nootropic, supporting focus and cognitive function.Natural Ingredients: A natural way to support overall well-being without harsh chemicals.Cons:Gradual Results: Effects can take some time to become noticeable, so patience is key.Capsule Size: Some may find the capsules a bit large to swallow comfortably.Overall, this Ashwagandha KSM-66 + Sensoril supplement has been a beneficial addition to my daily routine. It's a natural and effective way to manage stress and support mental clarity. Whether you're dealing with daily stressors or just looking to enhance your overall well-being, this supplement is a solid choice.

title: Great, works for me as part of a controlled diet and supplemented lifestyle
date: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 2 July 2023
review: I am lucky enough to get to try these supplements for free, I have always taken vitamins, creatine and tried tribulus and other supplements. There has never been more choice and marketing than now in this area and there are new things popping up all of the time. I take multivitamins, creatine, cod liver oil, fadogia agrestis and MACA root supplements currently. I added these recently and I have not felt any ill effects at all, I take them in the morning with other supplements. What I can say is that I train hard 6 days a week, all weightlifting exercises including squats and deadlifts. I am 46 this year so I will take any help I can get from supplements and vitamins on top of an 80% reasonably good diet. I have never felt better, I have energy I feel younger than my years and have not been ill for some time now. I put this partly down to supplements and its difficult to quantify results from these types of supplements but I can say that I feel energised 95% of the time most noticeably I am sleeping really well since starting this particular supplement and less tired in the gym because of this mainly. If you’re looking to feel more willing and sleep better then there is no reason not to try these. They have made a difference so far and I will continue to take them. Easily taken and decent value recommend trying them for more energy all around.

They can provide personalised advice and ensure it aligns with your individual health needs and any existing medications.Overall, a highly potent and effectiveAshwagandha KSM supplement for anxiety. Priced reasonably at £20.99 for 60 vegan capsules, it is worth considering. Remember to consult your doctor before starting any new supplement regimen.

The supplements seem high quality and incorporate pure natural ingredients and other proprietary blends and extracts that improve my cognitive processes. title: Ottima titolazione in withanolidi
review: Uno dei pochi prodotti che presenta entrambe le frazioni fondamentali dell’ashwagandha: Sensoril e KSM-66. Il primo, estratto da foglie e radice, ha proprietà nel ridurre ansia e stress, oltre ad avere un effetto sul miglioramento del sonno. Il secondo, solo da radice, è meno sedativo, ha più finalità in ambito sportivo, miglioramento concentrazione e resistenza fisica. Entrambi hanno capacità di riduzione del cortisolo. Di conseguenza in un prodotto dove vengono abbinati, si ha uno spettro totale e più completo, per una efficacia completa.

title: Ottimo prodotto!

Sembra poco, ma se una molecola è più specifica per ridurre ansia e migliorare il sonno, l’altra è più indicata nel ridurre cortisolo e di conseguenza più specifica per chi ricerca l’efficienza sportiva e avere un miglior profilo ormonale, a favore del testosterone, riducendo gli ormoni catabolici. Con questo prodotto si ha quindi doppio vantaggio. Ottima titolazione.

title: Spürbare Wirkung – mehr Ruhe, besserer Schlaf und Fokus!
review: Ich nehme das Ashwagandha KSM-66 mit Sensoril seit etwa zwei Monaten und merke deutlich die Wirkung: tieferer Schlaf, weniger Stress und mehr innere Ruhe. Auch die Konzentration ist besser und ich fühle mich ausgeglichener im Alltag.Top Kombination, gut verträglich – klare Empfehlung!

title: Muy bueno pero tienes que ser constante.
review: Ya hace por lo menos 10 meses que tomo este producto, siempre el mismo y tengo que reconocer que a mi me ha funcionado muy bien, pero solo ves los resultados entre el segundo y el tercer mes.  La comencé a tomar porque estoy premenopáusica ahora duermo mucho mejor y no tengo ansiedad y mis niveles de estrés se han reducido. Ha sido algo progresivo que ha ido mejorando mi situación poco a poco.

title: Efficace pour le stress et le sommeil
review: Assez épatant, je traversais une période de forts troubles du sommeil, j'avais essayé beaucoup de techniques pour favoriser le sommeil et rien n'y faisait. Je suis plutôt sceptique de nature, par contre cet Ashwaganda est très très efficace, après quelques jours il permet déjà un apaisement et un relâchement dans la journée. Après 2-3 semaines le sommeil se règle petit à petit. Vraiment un très bon produit.

title: Super...
review: Ich habe mich bewusst für dieses Ashwagandha-Produkt mit KSM-66 & Sensoril entschieden, da es beide hochwertigen Extrakte kombiniert – und ich wurde nicht enttäuscht.🧘‍♀️ Wirkung:Schon nach wenigen Tagen Einnahme habe ich eine deutlich bessere innere Balance gespürt. Ich fühle mich ausgeglichener, belastbarer im Alltag und auch die Schlafqualität hat sich verbessert. Kein "Plattsein" mehr nach stressigen Tagen – eher das Gefühl, stabiler durchs Leben zu gehen.💊 Zusammensetzung:Die Kombination aus KSM-66 und Sensoril ist selten und sehr hochwertig. Beide Varianten enthalten verschiedene Withanolide – die Konzentration ist mit 15–20 % hervorragend. Ich habe das Gefühl, hier bekommt man ein sehr durchdachtes, hochdosiertes Produkt.🫙 Kapseln & Verträglichkeit:Die Kapseln sind gut zu schlucken, neutral im Geschmack und ich hatte keinerlei Magenprobleme – obwohl ich sehr empfindlich bin.📦 Amazon Versand & Kundenservice:Wie immer reibungslos und schnell! Die Lieferung war am nächsten Tag da. Verpackung top, Produkt versiegelt und frisch. Auch bei Rückfragen zu einem früheren Produkt war der Amazon-Kundendienst wie gewohnt freundlich und lösungsorientiert – das gibt mir einfach ein gutes Gefühl beim Einkaufen.Fazit:Ein hochwertiges Produkt, das hält, was es verspricht. Ich werde es definitiv wieder bestellen. Besonders für Menschen, die mit Stress oder Schlafproblemen kämpfen, absolut empfehlenswert.Danke an Amazon und den Hersteller für ein so gelungenes Nahrungsergänzungsmittel!
